options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: include_monster_tokens
options.description: Include Monster Tokens as AP Locations/Items

options.name: include_keys
options.description: Include Keys as AP Locations/Items

options.name: include_warpgates
options.description:
Include Warp Gates as AP Locations/Items
Additionally, to offset issues with snack gates, you will start with 400 Scooby Snacks

options.name: include_snacks
options.description: Include Snacks as AP Locations/Items

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: completion_goal
options.description:
Select which completion goal you want for this world:
0 = Vanilla/Beat Mastermind
1 = Bosses
2 = Monster Tokens
3 = Bosses/Tokens
4 = Scooby Snacks
5 = Snacks/Bosses
6 = Snacks/Tokens
7 = Bosses/Tokens/Snacks
For Non-Vanilla options, Mastermind still needs to be defeated - you just can't fight him
until the goal has been met Snack Clear Conditions will only work with Snacksanity Enabled

options.name: boss_count
options.description: Sets the number of bosses needed if Boss Completion Goal is being used

options.name: token_count
options.description: Sets the number of tokens needed if Token Completion Goal is being used

options.name: snack_count
options.description: Sets the number of Scooby Snacks needed if Snack Completion Goal is being used

options.name: advanced_logic
options.description: Changes generation to expect certain tricks to be performed, intended for experienced players

options.name: expert_logic
options.description: Changes generation to expect certain tricks to be performed, intended for even MORE experienced players

options.name: creepy_early
options.description:
Changes generation to expect certain tricks to be performed (CREEPY EARLY [GCN]),
intended for less sane players

options.name: speedster
options.description: For Fun Setting, permanently makes scooby move at mach speed
